enemy.name: The Citation Needed
enemy.special: onPlayerChargeWrong: steals up to 5 block from player and converts to enemy HP. Can heal from BOTH this intent AND wrong-charge steal in same turn.

hand.name: Brace
hand.description: Block equal to enemy telegraph value.

hand.name: Slow
hand.description: Skip enemy's next defend or buff. Charge bonus: also weaken enemy.

relics.name: Iron Shield
relics.description: Start each turn with block = 2 + shields played last turn.

notes: Citation Needed is about to heal. Player has 8 block. The enemy steals block on wrong Charge and heals from it — so building MORE block via Fortify is risky. If player wrong-charges a Fortify (16 block), enemy can steal 5 of it AND then heal 5 from Consume remains = +10 HP total. Slow could cancel the heal intent if charged. Key tension: Slow is 2 AP and the charge bonus is valuable but risking wrong answer means enemy steals your block AND gains HP from heal. Is the block-steal mechanic leading to a feel-bad trap?
